content: # Vue 3 Application Architecture ## Recommended Folder Structure ``` src/ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ assets/ # Static assets в”њв”Ђв”Ђ components/ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ui/ # Reusable UI components в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Button.vue в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Input.vue в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ Modal.vue в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ layout/ # Layout components в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Header.vue в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ Sidebar.vue в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ features/ # Feature components в”њв”Ђв”Ђ composables/ # Composition API hooks в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ useAuth.ts в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ useFetch.ts в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ useForm.ts в”њв”Ђв”Ђ stores/ # Pinia stores в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ auth.ts в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ app.ts в”њв”Ђв”Ђ views/ # Page components в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Home.vue в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ Dashboard.vue в”њв”Ђв”Ђ router/ # Vue Router в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ index.ts в”њв”Ђв”Ђ services/ # API services в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ api.ts в”њв”Ђв”Ђ types/ # TypeScript types в””в”Ђв”Ђ App.vue ``` ## Key Principles 1. **Composition API**: Use ` ```
